implementation_summary.summary: CP00-663 closes the RP21 Admin Console review readiness bridge descriptor slice over 150 planned units, covering RP21.P08 synthetic fixture closeout rows, Hermes/Claude/closeout evidence rows, and RP21.P09 architecture/security/permission/audit/UI review readiness questions from RP21.P08.M06.S18 through RP21.P09.M07.S02. The slice remains no-write, no-real-data, descriptor-only, and runtime-closed.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-663 RP21.P08.M06.S18-RP21.P09.M07.S02 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
